_comment: Sanitized starter config. Copy to crabmeat.json and edit. Secrets (gateway.auth.token, admin.token) are injected from .env at load time — leave them out of this file.
_providers_note: Default ships an Anthropic stub — set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env. To use OpenAI, swap type to 'openai' and the env-var ref to $SECRET:OPENAI_API_KEY (model e.g. 'gpt-4o-mini'). To use a local Ollama, replace this block with the example in 'providers (local Ollama)' below and set allowLocalProviders=true (it already is).

tools.name: file_read
tools.description: Read the contents of a file.

cwd.description: Optional working directory; must be inside the workspace or an allowed file access root.

dry_run.description: Preview the command without running it.

agents.name: CrabMeat Agent
agents.systemPrompt: You are a capable AI agent running through CrabMeat. Use the available tools to investigate, plan, and execute tasks. Prefer read-only tools for exploration; use plan_mode before write/exec actions on non-trivial work.

_fileAccess_note: fileAccessPresets safely grants common user folders under your home directory. fileAccessPaths is for additional explicit absolute roots only, e.g. ["C:/Users/me/Projects", "D:/Media/Inbox"]. Do not use drive roots, home itself, or relative paths; the schema rejects them.
_emailImap_note: Inbound+outbound email connector. Credentials must NOT live here — put them in .crabmeat/local.json (gitignored), which deep-merges over this file at boot. Schema: connectors.emailImap = { user, password (Gmail App Password), from?, allowFromAddresses[] (required), outboundTo? (defaults to allowFromAddresses), imapHost?, imapPort?, smtpHost?, smtpPort?, pollIntervalMs?, mailbox? }. See README 'Email Agent' for the cold-start walk-through.
_refusalFallback_note: Interception layer: when the primary model refuses, CrabMeat silently reroutes to a fallback local provider. Two modes: (1) strict — only reroute requests whose content class is on contentClassAllowlist (nsfw-search, adult-creative, edgy-humor, security-research, substance-info); (2) rerouteUnclassified=true — also reroute when the classifier couldn't identify a class (the 'no babysitter' mode — catches small local models refusing benign queries). Disabled by default.
